degraded.detail: classify_complexity estimated 'medium' from message prose (signals.prior_source=keyword) but risk_flags=[] and the diff is test-only (shared/tests + bloat baseline, no runtime/FR change); downgraded to 'small' per diff-authoritative classification.

surface_verification.justification: Test-only change: dashboard-idempotency assertion, extraction into a sibling test module, and a bloat-baseline ratchet-down. No runtime code, API route, store mutation, SSE/WS handler, message contract, or UI-consumed code touched — there is no web or CLI surface to exercise.

behaviors.behavior: finalize dashboard render is byte-idempotent across two runs, excluding the wall-clock '> Updated:' banner minute
when the banner minute advances between two runs (minute-boundary straddle), the dashboard body + Session/Run banner suffix stay identical while the full byte-string differs
the idempotency cluster lives in a sub-300 sibling module and the ADR-096 exception file (test_finalize_iterate.py) ratchets down to 445 LOC

test_completeness.note: Pure-tooling iterate; no FR behavior delta, so the cross-layer execution-evidence gate does not fire. All introduced behaviors are testable and tested.
